name: pocketapp-price-collector
description: Standalone headless-browser worker that holds the one real connection to iqcent's price feed and relays ticks into the Laravel app (see app/Http/Controllers/PriceCollectorController.php). A plain server-side WS/HTTP client gets a Cloudflare 403 from iqcent; a real browser engine does not, so this runs one persistently via Playwright.

scripts.postinstall: playwright install --with-deps chromium || playwright install chromium
